parameters.name: IdSubscription
parameters.description: Internal identifier of the subscription to upgrade

parameters.name: ReferenceOffer
parameters.description: Shared identifier of the target offer

parameters.name: BillNow
parameters.description: If true, simulates immediate billing of the upgrade. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: Immediate
parameters.description: If false, simulates an upgrade that takes effect at end of term instead of immediately. Defaults to true.
